profile_backing.source: Post-p1vbf.50 RCH fmd fj-lax linalg profile with no ready br perf beads available.
profile_backing.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-pass184-profile cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg --quick --noplot

lever.description: Raise blocked GEMM KC from 256 to 512 to reduce C carry read/write passes from eight to four for k=2048 while preserving each output element's ascending-k product order.
lever.not_in_scope: No MR/NR register tile change, no adjacent-panel unrolling, no Strassen/recursive reassociation, no thread partitioning change.

baseline.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-x40u0-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64 --quick --noplot

candidate.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-x40u0-after cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64 --quick --noplot

delta.decision: Reject: larger KC reduced C pass count but lost locality enough to regress the same-worker focused Criterion row.

behavior_proof.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-x40u0-test cargo test -p fj-lax --lib matmul_2d -- --nocapture
isomorphism: Candidate preserved B panel packing layout and A pack layout; only the pc-block length changed.
Each output element still accumulated products in ascending k order with C carry values stored and reloaded exactly between pc blocks.
Candidate preserved row/thread partitioning, MR/NR tile coverage, border/remainder coverage, dtype/shape/error surface, and RNG absence.
No source change is shipped after rejection; final tree behavior is bit-for-bit the pre-candidate behavior.

next_route.primitive: materially different GEMM primitive beyond KC-size tuning
next_route.notes: Do not repeat KC enlargement or register-panel widening. Next GEMM attempt should attack a different surface such as output-write avoidance in GEMM callers, thread scheduling/affinity with same-run A/B, or an explicit parity-contract bead for algorithms that would otherwise alter floating-point association.
